name: clickhouse-architecture-advisor
description: Workload-aware architecture decision skill for ClickHouse - ingestion strategies, partitioning, enrichment, upsert patterns, and pre-aggregation with explicit official/derived/field provenance.

interface.shortDescription: Design ClickHouse architectures with workload-aware tradeoffs.
interface.longDescription: Use ClickHouse Architecture Advisor for workload-aware system design across ingestion strategy, time-series partitioning, enrichment joins, upserts, pre-aggregation, and other ClickHouse architecture choices with explicit provenance labels.
defaultPrompt: Design a ClickHouse architecture for this workload.
Choose ingestion and modeling patterns for ClickHouse.
